reviews.comment:
Buena atención..muy amables..Shop.. con variedad en alimentos fríos y calientes.. Sanitarios impecables..siendo pasada la media noche

(Translated by Google)
Great service, very friendly staff. Shop with a variety of hot and cold foods. Spotless restrooms, even after midnight.

reviews.comment:
De las playeras no puedo decir nada, turno dia o del turno noche divinas. Pero de las que atienden el full, son asquerosas, antipaticas, soberbias....Las chicas que estaban antes, eran fabulosas.... desde que estan estas, dejé de ir...

(Translated by Google)
I can't say anything bad about the beachgoers, day or night shift they're gorgeous. But the ones who work the full shift are disgusting, unfriendly, and arrogant... The girls who were there before were fabulous... since these ones came, I stopped going...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtelB6b0xnEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio! Rapido y eficiente.
El precio del combustible de los mejorcito en la zona aunque siempre 4 o 5 pesos más que en Panamericana.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service! Fast and efficient.
The fuel prices are among the best in the area, although they're always 4 or 5 pesos more than at Panamericana.

reviews.comment:
Excelente baños impecable.
Cafe el mas caro del mundo.
Buena atención.
Tiene buenos asientos al aire libre y predio grande.
Lastima que no den agua caliente sin cargo.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent, spotless bathrooms.
The most expensive coffee in the world.
Good service.
It has good outdoor seating and a large grounds.
It's a shame they don't provide free hot water.
